name: list_videos
description: List your Loom videos, sorted by most recent. Returns video IDs and names. Use get_video for metadata on a specific video, or get_video_details for comprehensive info including transcript and comments.

name: search_videos
description: Search Loom videos by keyword. Returns matching video IDs and names.

name: get_video
description: Get metadata for a Loom video including name, duration, owner, views, and creation date.

name: get_transcript
description: Get the full transcript of a Loom video with timestamps and speaker names.

save_dir.description: Optional directory path to save the transcript file

name: get_captions
description: Get WebVTT captions of a Loom video with start and end timestamps per cue.

save_dir.description: Optional directory path to save the captions file

name: get_summary
description: Get the AI-generated summary of a Loom video (1-2 concise sentences).

name: get_chapters
description: Get AI-generated chapter markers with timestamps for a Loom video. Useful for navigating long videos.

name: get_comments
description: Get comments on a Loom video, including threaded replies and timestamps.

name: get_download_url
description: Get a signed download URL for the MP4 file of a Loom video. The URL is temporary and expires. If no URL is available, use regenerate_mp4 first.

name: get_tasks
description: Get AI-generated action items (tasks) from a Loom video, including assignee, status, and description.

name: get_reactions
description: Get emoji reactions on a Loom video, including who reacted and at what timestamp.

name: get_meeting_notes
description: Get the Confluence meeting notes URL linked to a Loom video.

name: list_folders
description: List your Loom folders, sorted by most recent.

name: list_spaces
description: List your Loom spaces (workspaces).

name: get_space
description: Get details of a Loom space including name, privacy level, and whether it's the default space.

name: get_backlinks
description: Get external references (backlinks) to a Loom video — where it's been shared or embedded.

name: get_key_takeaways
description: Get AI-generated key takeaways from a Loom video as a bullet list.

name: get_tags
description: Get tags on a Loom video.

name: get_description
description: Get the AI-generated description of a Loom video with timestamped sections and bullet points.

name: get_confluence_pages
description: Get Confluence pages linked to a Loom video.

name: search_folders
description: Search your Loom folders by name.

name: get_last_watch_time
description: Get the last timestamp (in seconds) where you stopped watching a Loom video.

name: get_watch_later_count
description: Get the number of videos in your Watch Later list.

name: get_total_videos_count
description: Get the total number of videos created by a user.

name: get_frequent_reactions
description: Get your most frequently used emoji reaction types. Also useful to discover valid reaction type values before calling add_reaction.

name: get_comment_reactions
description: Get emoji reactions on a specific comment.

name: get_video_details
description: Get all available information for a Loom video in one call: metadata, transcript, summary, chapters, comments, tasks, and reactions.

save_dir.description: Optional directory path to save content files

name: get_user
description: Get a Loom user's profile by their ID — name, email, company, and avatar.

name: search_workspace_tags
description: Search for tags in your Loom workspace.

name: get_folder
description: Get details of a Loom folder including name, visibility, and creator.

name: update_video_name
description: Rename a Loom video. Overwrites the existing name.

name: update_video_description
description: Update the description of a Loom video. Overwrites the existing description.

name: update_video_settings
description: Update settings on a Loom video such as download_enabled, comments_enabled, etc.

name: create_comment
description: Post a comment on a Loom video. Each call creates a new comment.

timestamp.description: Optional video timestamp in seconds to anchor the comment

name: edit_comment
description: Edit an existing comment on a Loom video. Overwrites the comment text.

name: delete_comment
description: Delete a comment from a Loom video. This cannot be undone.

name: create_task
description: Create an action item (task) on a Loom video. Each call creates a new task.

assignee_id.description: Optional user ID to assign the task to

name: update_task
description: Update the content of an action item (task) on a Loom video.

name: delete_task
description: Delete an action item (task) from a Loom video. This cannot be undone.

name: approve_task
description: Mark an action item (task) as approved on a Loom video.

name: respond_to_task
description: Respond to an action item (task) on a Loom video.

name: add_reaction
description: Add an emoji reaction to a Loom video at a specific timestamp. Use get_frequent_reactions to discover valid reaction type values.

time.description: Timestamp in seconds for the reaction

name: delete_reaction
description: Delete an emoji reaction from a Loom video.

name: toggle_following
description: Follow or unfollow a Loom video to get notifications.

follow.description: True to follow, False to unfollow

name: delete_video
description: Permanently delete a Loom video. This cannot be undone. To temporarily remove a video, use archive_videos instead. To recover a recently deleted video, use recover_video.

name: archive_videos
description: Archive or unarchive Loom videos. Archived videos are hidden but not deleted.

video_ids.description: List of Loom video IDs to archive

archive.description: True to archive, False to unarchive

name: duplicate_video
description: Duplicate a Loom video. Creates a new copy each time.

name: add_to_watch_later
description: Add a Loom video to your Watch Later list.

minutes_from_utc.description: Timezone offset in minutes from UTC (default 0)

name: remove_from_watch_later
description: Remove a Loom video from your Watch Later list.

name: create_folder
description: Create a new Loom folder. Each call creates a new folder.

name: rename_folder
description: Rename a Loom folder.

name: delete_folders
description: Delete one or more Loom folders. This cannot be undone.

folder_ids.description: List of Loom folder IDs to delete

name: move_videos
description: Move one or more Loom videos to a different folder.

video_ids.description: List of Loom video IDs to move

name: move_folders
description: Move one or more Loom folders into a different parent folder.

folder_ids.description: List of Loom folder IDs to move

name: recover_video
description: Recover a deleted Loom video from the trash.

name: pin_video
description: Pin or unpin a Loom video in your library.

pinned.description: True to pin, False to unpin

name: add_comment_reaction
description: Add an emoji reaction to a comment on a Loom video.

name: toggle_following_tag
description: Follow or unfollow a tag in your Loom workspace to get notifications.

follow.description: True to follow, False to unfollow

name: share_videos_to_spaces
description: Share one or more Loom videos to one or more spaces.

video_ids.description: List of Loom video IDs to share

space_ids.description: List of Loom space IDs to share to

name: regenerate_mp4
description: Trigger MP4 regeneration for a Loom video. Use this when get_download_url reports that no URL is available. Regeneration is asynchronous — after triggering, wait ~30 seconds then retry get_download_url.
